nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜雨林
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括白喉䳍、巴西穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马代拉河
nodes.summary: 马代拉河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联55种鸟类，包括Red-throated piping guan、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Pale-winged trumpeter等55种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴西
nodes.summary: 巴西是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联854种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、侏䳍、白腹拟䳍等854种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Fulvous-chinned nunlet
nodes.summary: Fulvous-chinned nunlet（Fulvous-chinned nunlet，学名 Nonnula sclateri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The fulvous-chinned nunlet is found in southwestern Amazonia south of the Amazon River, from eastern Peru and northern Bolivia east in southwestern Brazil as far as the Madeira River

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The fulvous-chinned nunlet is found in southwestern Amazonia south of the Amazon River, from eastern Peru and northern Bolivia east in southwestern Brazil as far as the Madeira River

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits the understory of upland terra firme forest but has also been reported at the edges of seasonally flooded várzea forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits the understory of upland terra firme forest but has also been reported at the edges of seasonally flooded várzea forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the fulvous-chinned nunlet as being of Least Concern, though its population is unknown and believed to be decreasing. It is rare over its large range, making its numbers difficult to measure. Though no specific threats have been identified, "[a]s is the case with all species of Amazonian forest birds, Fulvous-chinned Nunlet is vulnerable to habitat loss or degradation from a wide range of human activities."
